visualInspectionAddendum.reason: Added tighter mobile screenshots after visual QA found the first captures did not show the weekly board heading and Today plan fields clearly.

objective: Add a higher-level browser-local Weekly operating board that turns local day history, captures, and experiment decisions into a cautious plan handoff back to Today.
truthBoundary: Weekly board is derived only from browser-local demo history, captures, and experiment records.
No WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Postgres, backend writes, reminders, timers, or cross-device sync are connected or claimed.
Lab/source boot reports remain red, so connected LifeMax daily usability is not claimed.

static: npm run build passed: 10 static pages generated

browser.localServer: next start on http://127.0.0.1:3000 after production build
browser.flow: visible reset -> load sample week -> Patterns weekly board ready -> Use week plan in Today -> Today plan fields update -> refresh persistence -> desktop Patterns check

approvalStatus: Production promotion was previously approved by user message: PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote. This slice does not edit credentials/auth/DNS/backend services.

Runtime rollback: promote the previous Vercel production deployment; no database/auth/credential migration is part of this slice.
User data rollback is not needed for backend records because this feature writes only browser-local demo state.
